segments.speaker: 题目15/16
segments.text: Listening to a conversation. did you bring the tickets for the play? I thought we could head in early and get coffee from the lobby cafe. There are some hand painted posters of old productions there too. Oh no, I just realized I left the tickets on the kitchen counter. Seriously, that's a bit of a problem. Wait. didn't you say you downloaded the digital versions last night, just in case? Oh, you're right. I completely forgot about that. Let me check my email. You just saved this, a trip back home, and now we still have time for that coffee.
